0.text: Scarring changes in the apex of both lungs

1.text: Scarring changes in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

2.text: Scarring changes in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Scarring changes in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Diffuse mild ectasia in bilateral bronchial structures

5.text: Increased peribronchial thickness in bilateral bronchial structures
